action_set_definitions.name: get_environment_state
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the full current state of the project environment, including financial capital, staff availability, and the progress/resource status of all active projects.

action_set_definitions.name: set_project_resource_profile
action_set_definitions.description: Assigns a specific resource profile to a project. This determines the cost and staff allocation for the project in the next time step.

profile.description: The resource profile to apply: 'Rapid-Response' (High cost, low staff) or 'Standard-Labor' (Low cost, high staff).

action_set_definitions.name: convert_roi_to_budget
action_set_definitions.description: Converts accumulated return on investment (ROI) from completed project milestones back into the total budget remaining to fund ongoing operations.

amount.description: The amount of cumulative_roi to transfer to total_budget_remaining.

action_set_definitions.name: advance_simulation_step
action_set_definitions.description: Progresses the environment by one time period. This calculates project advancement based on dependencies and deducts budget based on active resource profiles.

state_description.current_period: The current time step or month of the fiscal year.
state_description.total_budget_remaining: The total financial capital remaining for allocation across all projects.
state_description.staff_pool_available: Number of staff members currently unassigned and available for work.
state_description.active_projects: A list of projects currently in progress and their status.
state_description.cumulative_roi: The total return on investment generated by completed projects so far.
